3. **@Chainriffs**  
   Full tweet text: "🦈 My feedback after testing the $MiroShark AI agent hive:   > After the agents finish their discussions with posts, replies, opinion changes, and Polymarket trades, you get a complete workbench: full URL with sources, ReACT report, influence leaderboard, and chat to talk to any agent or group like a living hive.   > It feels like running a parallel universe 24/7 to predict real-world reactions.  🐝 Then you build your final analysis on any topic you want.   > I tested it uploading real documents and running 100-300 agents. The realistic debates, opinion flips, market impact, and useful workbench made it incredibly cool.   > Agents with unique personalities argue, convince each other, and switch sides hour by hour. Pure magic and super fun!  🔥 What impressed me most is the creativity and precision of this swarm intelligence.   > Each agent has memory, emotions, and influence levels, creating organized chaos that mirrors the real internet accurately.   > Simulations with news, startup drafts, and memes delivered insights I’d never think of alone.  🚀 In short, $MiroShark is an addictive predictive playground, not just another AI tool.   > Open-source, runs locally or in the cloud, with a low-cap token for the journey.   > Check aaronjmars GitHub and get ready to have your mind blown by this intelligent hive. Ready to simulate the future? 🦈💥"[[3]](https://x.com/i/status/2043931761466376271)  
   Date posted: 2026-04-14

8. **@Chainriffs**  
   Full tweet text: "🦈 I believe $MiroShark is criminally undervalued, and I'll explain why I think so!  > Powerful swarm intelligence engine: uploads any document and generates hundreds of agents with Neo4j memory, unique personalities, and real-world network simulations + prediction markets. Local-first (Docker + Ollama), complete observability, and ReACT reports with leaderboard concrete utility being tested now.  🚀 Pedigree of developer @aaronjmars: neuroAI researcher venture-backed by Telah VC, with projects like Aeon, Soul.md, and OpenDia. Uses Aeon itself to accelerate $MiroShark (self-improvement loop), and the token has autonomous revenue via @bankrbot fees strong alignment and daily commits on @github / @github_repo trending.  📈 Brutal asymmetry: the original MiroFish raised US$4.1M in 24 hours; $MiroShark is the improved global/open-source version, still low-cap with strong GitHub traction (stars + fast forks). Alphas such as meta simulations and integration with the developer stack point to a huge upside in 2026.   🦈 @aixbt_agent describes $MiroShark as “legal insider trading” for prediction markets, simulating AI agent reactions to undisclosed documents and anticipating sentiment, narratives, and market movements before they go public.  > The edge comes from a cross-platform feedback loop, where agents interact with price changes and evolving narratives in real time, enabling deeper prediction of odds and trends beyond traditional analysis.  > Open-source, rapidly evolving, and integrated into the @Polymarket ecosystem, it positions itself as a strategic edge within a billion-dollar market.  > CA: 0xd7bc6a05a56655FB2052F742B012d1DFD66e1BA3  ~ DYOR / NFA!"[[8]](https://x.com/i/status/2043952784521724264)  
   Date posted: 2026-04-14
